description: Plain-English security tip framed as a 'threat of the week'.
angle: Name one current threat, explain it simply, give one practical defense. Reassuring, not fear-mongering.

description: Phishing red flags employees should know.
angle: List 2-3 concrete tells of a phishing message. Wire-transfer and invoice-fraud lures are common. Educational, empowering.

description: Password and MFA basics done right.
angle: Explain why MFA matters and one practical way to roll it out without frustrating staff.

description: Patch management and why 'we'll do it later' is risky.
angle: Explain why timely patching matters, using a relatable 'we'll get to it' scenario. We handle patching in the background, scheduled and tested.

description: Backup and disaster recovery, myth vs reality (Veeam).
angle: Bust a backup misconception. Real recoverability means tested, offline copies. We run Veeam-based backup and disaster recovery, tested regularly.

description: Small-business cyber stat + reassurance + soft CTA.
angle: Use the ~60% of small businesses close within 6 months of a cyberattack stat sparingly, then pivot to accessible, managed protection.

description: 'What an MSP actually does' explainer.
angle: Demystify managed IT: a dedicated IT department without the payroll. Monitoring, security, backups, helpdesk as one coordinated plan.

description: 'Enterprise security for small business, on purpose' credibility post.
angle: We brought enterprise IT security to small business, on purpose. Robust protection without the enterprise price tag.

description: Microsoft 365 security tips.
angle: One practical M365 security tip (conditional access, legacy auth, secure sharing). Approachable.

description: Cloud / Microsoft Azure infrastructure tips.
angle: A practical cloud tip: right-sizing, cost control, or secure architecture on Azure. Keep it grounded.

description: Governed AI adoption for business (a real SkySystems focus).
angle: Small and mid-sized teams can adopt AI safely. Talk about governed AI, shadow-AI risk, and getting real productivity without failing an audit. Practical, not hype.

description: Helpdesk / fast-response value prop, human story angle.
angle: A real engineer answers, no phone tree, no ticket lost in a queue. Frame around reassurance and trust on the bad days.

description: Business phone systems / VoIP (3CX).
angle: Modern business phones: reliable, mobile, and cost-effective. 3CX-based systems that just work across locations.

description: Network security / firewalls (WatchGuard) + secure WiFi.
angle: Your firewall and WiFi are the front door. Talk about layered network defense and secure, segmented WiFi without the jargon.

description: Public Safety & Municipalities: CJIS, dispatch/CAD uptime, ransomware.
angle: Mission-critical IT for those who serve. CJIS-compliant networks, ransomware defense, dispatch/CAD uptime, audit-ready documentation.

description: Ministries & Non-Profits: donor data, streaming, volunteer access.
angle: IT that protects your mission. Secure donor and member data, broadcast-quality streaming, and access control when volunteers move on. Enterprise demands on a lean budget.

description: Mega Churches & Multi-Campus: broadcast, multi-site, AI-ready.
angle: Enterprise scale, kingdom mission. Multi-campus infrastructure, broadcast-grade production that never drops, made AI-ready so staff can do more ministry.

description: Financial Services: fraud, regulator-grade security, governed AI.
angle: Attackers follow the money. Community banks, credit unions, RIAs, and fintechs get regulator-grade security, exam-ready compliance, and governed AI. Defend against wire and invoice fraud.

description: Professional Services: law/accounting/consulting confidentiality.
angle: Your reputation runs on confidentiality. Protect privileged client data, keep billable systems fast, and add AI that multiplies professionals' time, safely.

description: Retail: PCI, multi-site POS uptime, guest experience.
angle: Every location online, every payment secure. PCI-aligned multi-site networks that keep POS up at the busiest hour, plus AI to run leaner.

description: Smaller Cities & Towns: CJIS + ransomware on a public budget.
angle: Big-city IT security, small-city budget. CJIS-proven compliance, ransomware defense, and safe AI for cities and towns priced for public budgets.

description: Technology, Media & Telecom: cloud, DevOps, uptime, AI.
angle: Ship faster, never go dark. Cloud, DevOps, and high-throughput infrastructure for tech, media, and telecom, plus AI in products and operations.

description: Why a local Austin IT partner beats a faceless national provider.
angle: Austin-based, responsive, and invested in Central Texas businesses. A real partner you can reach, not a distant call center.
